title: helleborine rubra
intro: Helleborine rubra, a type of orchid, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its roots and leaves. The health benefits associated with helleborine rubra are said to include the relief of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of helleborine rubra can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to treat various health conditions, although it's essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant for medicinal purposes.
